zh.lifeSummary: Jordanna von Arberg和Graf Amadeus von Neuenburg至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jordanna von Arberg和Graf Amadeus von Neuenburg至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Arberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several settlements called Amberg (literally ‘by the mountain’), including a city in Bavaria. It could also be a topographic name of identical etymology.

Jewish (Ashkenazic): possibly from 1; alternatively, it may be a habitational name from the city of Hamburg (see Hamburger ). Many varieties of Yiddish lack h and -burg is sometimes replaced by -berg in Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Hamburger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Jakob, Avrohom, Isadore, Myer, Nachman, Yaakov, Yehuda, Yisroel, Zvi.  German Kurt, Monika, Frieda, Siegmund, Viktor.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Hamburg (see   Hamburg  ).

variants.name: Amberger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Amberg, see   Amberg  . Compare   Amburgey  .

nameMeanings.name: Jordanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
